sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 33:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 33:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot of the Guf are an expansion Malchut of the Rosh. This is because Malchut of the Rosh expands from her and within her to ten Sefirot from above downward, which are called Guf. Hence, the Sefira of the Guf, which is the branches of the Peh, is Malchut of the Rosh. (Item 1)
